title: HITL Response Forgery Resistance
hypothesis: HumanReviewResponse is frozen at creation — a forged approval cannot override a legitimate rejection.

result.summary: Experiment failed with unhandled exception: HumanReviewResponse.timeout_response() missing 1 required positional argument: 'task_ids'
errors: TypeError: HumanReviewResponse.timeout_response() missing 1 required positional argument: 'task_ids'
